{{Infobox character
| name = Beast King
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Beast King, Herald, guardian
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

''See also: [[Beast King Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The Beast [[King]] is a legendary figure who has existed for centuries. According to local lore, he was once a boy with physical impairments who formed bonds with ancient [[sacred beasts]] and eventually ascended to the rank of [[Herald]]. He serves as a guardian of human civilization, stationed in the [[Wasteland]] to protect the [[Blackflame Empire]] from [[dragons]]. He is described as being constantly engaged in a continuous war against the [[Dreadgods]], often ignoring all else to focus on his battles. Physically, he has appeared as a man with an unkempt beard and silver eyes. He is known to provide protection to certain individuals, such as [[Ziel of the Wasteland]], and may take humans under his wing if he perceives them as vital assets in the conflict against [[dragons]]. He is also capable of assigning tasks to others, such as [[Golds]], to assist with his objectives.}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The Beast [[King]] is a legendary figure who rose to the rank of [[Herald]] after befriending ancient [[sacred beasts]] as a crippled boy. He serves as one of the guardians protecting human civilization within the [[Wasteland]] that lies between the land of the [[dragons]] and [[Akura]] territory. Maintaining a presence on the [[island]], he acts as a patron and protector to [[Ziel]]. During his time there, he can be seen sitting upon a log while eating meat.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Beast King]] has territory on the [[island]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Beast King]] is a figure who provides protection to [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12">''Ghostwater'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Beast King]] is a legend who was once a crippled boy that befriended ancient [[sacred beasts]] and rose to the level of a [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Beast King]] is one of the guardians protecting human civilization in the [[Wasteland]] between [[Akura]] territory and the land of the [[dragons]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Beast King]] is [[Ziel]]'s patron.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Beast King]] sits on a log and eats meat.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Beast King]] is sought out by [[Northstrider]] in the [[Wasteland]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Beast King]] and his fellow [[Heralds]] will help keep cults in check.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Beast King]] will be pleased to see [[Lord]] [[Ziel]] in fighting shape.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Beast King]] is fighting against the [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“The Beast King will be pleased to see you in fighting shape once again.”<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Soldiers]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
